history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B and facing right (`>`). The cell directly in front of me, row 02 column C, is lava (`L`), so moving forward would be unsafe. To progress toward the goal at row 04 column D, I should first turn downward so I can move around the lava safely.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is below and to the right, but the cell directly below me at row 03 column B is safe `.`. Moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal without touching lava.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 04 column B, which is safe, and it gets me closer to the goal while avoiding lava at column C. 
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The goal O is to my right at row 04 column D, and the cell directly in front of me at row 05 column B is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To head toward the goal, I should rotate clockwise to face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B, facing left (`<`). The cell to my left is a wall, so moving forward is not safe. The goal is at row 04 column D, which is to my right. To face right from left, I need to turn around; one clockwise turn will face up, not toward the goal. I should rotate clockwise first to progress toward the goal while avoiding lava in columns C at rows 02 and 03.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up (`^`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 03 column B, which is safe, but that does not move directly toward the goal yet. To progress toward the goal, I should face right first so I can move toward column D while avoiding the lava in column C on rows 02 and 03.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D, and the cell directly in front of me at row 04 column C is safe (`.`). Moving forward gets me closer to the goal without entering lava.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column C facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is immediately to my right at row 04 column D, and that cell is safe. I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
